channel.title: Twitter on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Twitter on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: Why pay for a “rare” handle when you can get one for free?
item.description:
$2500 as the lowest price? What a joke. Seriously, setup your own Mastodon instance and create as many handles as you want.

Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: The Shit Show
item.description:
Check out this article: The Shit Show.

Note: Since this is an automatically created post there’s no commentary on it. Read it and do your own critical thinking. I may get around to adding some of my own thoughts or categorizing it… but maybe not.Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: I just got myself banned from Elon Musk’s Twitter. Here’s why you should, too
item.description:
Check out this article: I just got myself banned from Elon Musk’s Twitter. Here’s why you should, too.

Note: Since this is an automatically created post there’s no commentary on it. Read it and do your own critical thinking. I may get around to adding some of my own thoughts or categorizing it… but maybe not.Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!
